top_signals.title: Ebola Outruns Containment in Eastern Congo as Contact Tracing Falters
top_signals.summary: Ebola is spreading faster than responders can track it in eastern Congo, where health workers managed to follow up with barely one in five identified contacts in a single day.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Get ready to take sides in Big Tech’s giant IPO bake-off

top_signals.title: Bond slump stirs vigilante fears
top_signals.summary: A sense is setting in among investment professionals that we have a serious problem here

top_signals.title: Superdrug owner shrugs off volatility to press ahead with $30bn dual listing
top_signals.summary: AS Watson plans to publicly trade shares in both Hong Kong and London before the end of 2026

top_signals.title: The boutique bank that eschews blockbuster bragging rights
top_signals.summary: Lincoln International may not be a household name but it occupies a niche in the market

top_signals.title: Wall Street thinks IMAX is ripe for a sale. Here's who could buy it
top_signals.summary: A source told CNBC that IMAX has held "preliminary talks" through intermediaries, but no official pitches have been made by the company.
